featuredPlaylists.title:
Deck Ready's
Deck Favorites
featuredPlaylists.description: I've played thousands of games on the Steam Deck and these are the ones I had the best time with. They all look, play and perform great on the Deck and will keep you busy for years to come

featuredPlaylists.title:
DeckFilter's
Deck Favorites
featuredPlaylists.description: My own Steam Deck favorites for a quick relaxing session. Always installed for a break in between.

featuredPlaylists.title:
DeckFilter's
Wintermute
featuredPlaylists.description: Snowy, winter-themed games I've played on the Deck or can't wait to experience during the cold season.

featuredPlaylists.title:
Gardiner Bryant's
Deck Favorites
featuredPlaylists.description: I love games with roguelike elements, puzzle games, strategies, and arcade titles. These are some of my personal favorite games on Steam.

featuredPlaylists.title:
InnoVision Games'
Go-To Games
featuredPlaylists.description: A playlist of my favorite games. When I'm having trouble finding something to play, this is my go-to list.

featuredPlaylists.title: Midnight Scenes Series
featuredPlaylists.description: A personal spotlight on the Midnight Scenes anthology. Pixel-art horror shorts I played on the Steam Deck, loved for their eerie atmosphere and subtle storytelling.

featuredPlaylists.title:
Santiago Santiago's
Deck Favorites
featuredPlaylists.description: These are the games that I recommend for their general stability on Steam Deck, battery life and overall price when on sale. Easy to pick up and play, some of the best stuff out there

featuredPlaylists.title:
Steam Deck Checker's
Deck Picks
featuredPlaylists.description: Games I've tested on Steam Deck and recommend checking out for performance, gameplay, or handheld appeal.
featuredPlaylists.notes: Paused while the creator refines this playlist's positioning and game selection.

featuredPlaylists.title:
Steam Flow's
Deck Favorites
featuredPlaylists.description: These are the games I keep coming back to on the Steam Deck. They run great in handheld, feel good with controls, and are perfect for quick pick-up sessions. This playlist is all about fun, replayability, and games that make the Steam Deck shine.

featuredPlaylists.title:
SDHQ's
Deck Favorites
featuredPlaylists.description: As the CEO of SDHQ, I play a ton of games, but these ones are the few that stood out to me the most this year. These are games I keep coming back to or I think are essential for the portable library.
